steps.description: In the "Input volume" section, select the CT volume for processing.

sub_operations.description: Select the CT volume to be used for segmentation.
sub_operations.question: Select the CT volume for processing.

choice_info.question: Select the CT volume for processing.

ui_guidance.title: Select CT Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the CT volume from the list.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Reference_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation named 'Reference_Segmentation'.

ui_guidance.title: Create Reference Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to the Segment Editor module and create a new segmentation named "Reference_Segmentation".

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Reference_Segment" under "Reference_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Add a segment named 'Reference_Segment' to the reference segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Add and Rename Segment
ui_guidance.instruction: Click Add and rename the segment to "Reference_Segment".

operation_descriptions: Add a segment named 'Reference_Segment' to the reference segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor.

operation_descriptions: Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

sub_operations.description: Set the threshold range for reference segmentation.
sub_operations.question: Adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

choice_info.question: Adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Threshold Range
ui_guidance.instruction: Set the threshold slider to the desired range.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the threshold effect.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Islands effect in Segment Editor.

operation_descriptions: Activate the Islands effect in Segment Editor.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep selected island" option.

sub_operations.description: Set the Islands effect to 'Keep selected island' option.

operation_descriptions: Set the Islands effect to 'Keep selected island' option.

steps.description: In the 2D view, click to select the reference part.

sub_operations.description: Click in the 2D view to select the reference part island.
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click in the 2D view to select the reference part island.

steps.placement_instructions: Click in the 2D view to select the reference part island.

ui_guidance.title: Select Reference Part
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the reference part island in the 2D view.

steps.description: Set the segment "Reference_Segment" invisible.

sub_operations.description: Set the reference segment invisible.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Moving_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation named 'Moving_Segmentation'.

ui_guidance.instruction: Create a new segmentation named "Moving_Segmentation" in the Segment Editor.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Threshold effect for moving segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

ui_guidance.instruction: Set the threshold slider to the desired range.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the threshold effect for moving segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Islands effect for moving segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep selected island" option.

sub_operations.description: Set the Islands effect to 'Keep selected island' for moving.

steps.description: In the 2D view, click to select the moving part.

sub_operations.description: Click in the 2D view to select the moving part island.
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click in the 2D view to select the moving part island.

steps.placement_instructions: Click in the 2D view to select the moving part island.

ui_guidance.title: Select Moving Part
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the moving part island in the 2D view.

steps.description: Set the segment "Moving_Segment" invisible.

sub_operations.description: Set the moving segment invisible.

steps.description: In the "Reference segmentation (blue)" section, select the reference segmentation node.

sub_operations.description: Select the reference segmentation node from the tree.
sub_operations.question: Select the reference segmentation node.

ui_guidance.title: Select Reference Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the reference segmentation node from the dropdown.

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction (reference)" button.

sub_operations.description: Perform 3D reconstruction of the reference segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Moving segmentation (blue)" section, select the moving segmentation node.

sub_operations.description: Select the moving segmentation node from the tree.
sub_operations.question: Select the moving segmentation node.

ui_guidance.title: Select Moving Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the moving segmentation node from the dropdown.

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction (moving)" button.

sub_operations.description: Perform 3D reconstruction of the moving segmentation.

steps.description: Click the "Add / reset reference ROI" button.

sub_operations.description: Create/reset an ROI for the reference model.

steps.description: Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI to retain the fractured part of the reference model.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries for the reference model.
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries for the reference model.

steps.placement_instructions: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries for the reference model.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Reference ROI
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the ROI handles to enclose the fractured part of the reference model.

steps.description: Click the "Add / reset moving ROI" button.

sub_operations.description: Create/reset an ROI for the moving model.

steps.description: Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI to retain the fractured part of the moving model.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries for the moving model.
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries for the moving model.

steps.placement_instructions: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries for the moving model.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Moving ROI
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the ROI handles to enclose the fractured part of the moving model.

steps.description: Click the "Detect fracture surfaces" button.

sub_operations.description: Detect fracture surfaces using reference and moving models and ROIs.

steps.description: Click the "Reduce fracture" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply fracture reduction to align the moving fragment.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Manually adjust the moving fragment" box. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask user if manual adjustment of moving fragment is needed; if not, stop.
sub_operations.question: Further adjustments required?

ui_guidance.title: Manual Adjustment Needed?
ui_guidance.instruction: Check the box if you want to manually adjust the moving fragment.

steps.description: Manually adjust the moving fragment.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the moving fragment after reduction.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Camera View
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to inspect the moving fragment.

steps.description: Click the "Harden transform into moving fragment" button.

sub_operations.description: Harden the transform into the moving fragment.
